description: Group containing behavior information (null in case of mobile SDK)

profiling_time.description: How long user data was gathered for, in milliseconds

time_spent_in_hidden.description: Duration of the page being in the background

time_spent_in_visible.description: Duration of the page being in the foreground

kb_dwell_time_sd.description: Standard deviation dwell keyboard time for specific field

kb_dwell_time_min.description: Minimum dwell keyboard time for specific field

kb_dwell_time_median.description: Median dwell keyboard time for specific field

kb_dwell_time_max.description: Maximum dwell keyboard time for specific field

kb_flight_time_sd.description: Standard deviation flight keyboard time for specific field

kb_flight_time_min.description: Minimum flight keyboard time for specific field

kb_flight_time_median.description: Median flight keyboard time for specific field

kb_flight_time_max.description: Maximum flight keyboard time for specific field

kb_dwell_time_mean.description: Average dwell keyboard time for specific field

kb_flight_time_mean.description: Average flight keyboard time for specific field

kb_keys_frequency.description: Mapping where each key is integer code of a keyboard key and value is the number of its occurrences.

data.description: List of dict related to clipboard events

targetId.description: HTML ID of field related to event

clipboardText.description: Text related to event, may be masked if sensitive text was detected

name.description: HTML ID of specific field related to event

sensitive.description: Information if field was marked as sensitive

kb_dwell_time_sd.description: Standard deviation dwell keyboard time for specific field

kb_dwell_time_min.description: Minimum dwell keyboard time for specific field

kb_dwell_time_median.description: Median dwell keyboard time for specific field

kb_dwell_time_max.description: Maximum dwell keyboard time for specific field

kb_flight_time_sd.description: Standard deviation flight keyboard time for specific field

kb_flight_time_min.description: Minimum flight keyboard time for specific field

kb_flight_time_median.description: Median flight keyboard time for specific field

kb_flight_time_max.description: Maximum flight keyboard time for specific field

kb_dwell_time_mean.description: Average dwell keyboard time for specific field

kb_flight_time_mean.description: Average flight keyboard time for specific field

fields.description: List of behavioral properties per field on form
